description: Enable admins to manage workspace members and review changes.

userStories.title: Add member invitation support
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so I can grant access without editing the database directly.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can submit an email invite for a new member.
Invite flow records membership state needed for later activation.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Change member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to switch a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so access matches responsibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can change an existing member role to viewer, editor, or admin.
Role updates persist and validate allowed roles.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so former members no longer reach workspace data.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can revoke access for an existing workspace member.
Revoked members lose workspace access without manual database changes.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Record membership changes in audit log
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership changes captured in an audit log so the system preserves a history of invite, role, and revoke actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite, role-change, and revoke actions append audit log entries.
Audit records include actor, action, and timestamp details.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show audit history in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page so I can audit access management activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page lists recent membership audit log entries.
Audit list shows enough information to understand who changed which membership and when.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
